The '''''Gilder''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the operations of [[Task Force Vengeance]], it was misfortunate enough to fall prey to Star Destroyer [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] and Interdictor ''[[Compellor]]'' during the two Imperial vessels' hunt for illicit activity near the [[Blair Cluster/Legends|Blair Cluster]]. Upon being ripped from hyperspace, ''Gilder'' first attempted flight. However, after its small [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] escort was destroyed by [[Avenger Squadron]] and ''Gilder'' itself suffered damage, it surrendered. Its whole crew and passengers were arrested. Its subsequent fate is unknown.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
